error_signature: symmetric fir odd taps golden mismatch center tap pre_add doubled total errors <n>
raw_error_example:
Total samples tested: <N>
Total errors: <N>
First mismatch at sample <N>: expected=<N>, got=<N> (delta=<N>)
Pattern: RTL output is systematically larger than golden
root_cause: Symmetric FIR with odd TAPS added the center tap to itself inside the pre-adder loop. The center tap at index TAPS/2 has no symmetric pair and must be multiplied directly, not pre-added.
fix_rule: For symmetric FIR with odd TAPS, exclude index CENTER=TAPS/2 from the pre-adder for-loop. Multiply it directly: mult[CENTER] = data_reg[CENTER] * coeff[CENTER]. The pre-adder loop iterates i from 0 to CENTER-1 only.
